title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
summary: MIT PhD in Computer Vision & Computer Graphics with 20+ years building production ML systems for search, content ranking, and recommendation at scale. Three patents in NLP-based recommendation systems using vector embeddings, with hands-on expertise across computer vision, LLMs, generative AI, and RAG pipelines — deployed for Fortune 500 clients on AWS.
